final:
module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input power_good,
    output reg out
);always @(*) begin
  wire _tap_A = A & {1{1'b1}};

    if (A && B && power_good) begin
        out <= 1'b1; // Set out to high
    end else begin
        out <= 1'b0; // Set out to low
    end
end

endmodule
